basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR-National Institute for Implementation Research on Non-Communicable Diseases (NIHR), Jodhpur
basic_details.short_information: ICMR-National Institute for Implementation Research on Non-Communicable Diseases (NIHR), Jodhpur has invited applications for the post of Project Technical Support - I under the project “Implementation Research for Optimizing the Comprehensive Sickle Cell Anemia (SCA) Care Services under the National SCA Elimination Mission”. A Walk-in-Interview / Written Test is scheduled on 14-07-2026. Find all details about ICMR NIHR Jodhpur Project Technical Support vacancy 2026, eligibility, remuneration, and interview process here.

qualification.details: Essential Qualifications: | 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI or equivalent) + two years experience in relevant subject/field OR Three years Graduate degree + one year experience in Laboratory work / data collection / data entry OR Post-Graduate (PG) degree in Social Sciences / Social work / Life sciences. | Age Limit: Not exceeding 28 years on the date of walk-in interview/written test (relaxation as per rules).

how_to_apply: Candidates must appear for Walk-in-Interview / Written Test.
Download the application form from http://niirncd.icmr.org.in or https://www.icmr.gov.in.
Bring one set of photocopies of all certificates along with original certificates for verification.
Report at ICMR-NIHR, Jodhpur on 14-07-2026 between 09:00 AM to 10:00 AM.
Eligible candidates will attend Walk-in-Interview / Written Test after verification.
important_instructions: If more than 30 eligible candidates, a written test may be conducted. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview/written test. The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Candidates who have served in ICMR projects/institutes for more than three years are not eligible. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

Engagement is temporary and can be terminated with one month’s notice. Selected candidates will have no claim for regular appointment. Age, qualification, and experience will be reckoned as on the date of walk-in. All guidelines issued by ICMR will be followed.

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Jodhpur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: ICMR-NIHR Jodhpur has released notification for recruitment of Project Technical Support-I on purely temporary basis. The notification includes essential qualifications, age limit, remuneration, terms & conditions, and walk-in details. content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Jodhpur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualifications: 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI or equivalent) + two years experience in relevant subject/field OR Three years Graduate degree + one year experience in Laboratory work / data collection / data entry OR Post-Graduate (PG) degree in Social Sciences / Social work / Life sciences. Age Limit: Not exceeding 28 years on the date of walk-in interview/written test (relaxation as per rules).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICMR-NIHR Jodhpur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must appear for Walk-in-Interview / Written Test. Step-by-Step Process: Download the application form from http://niirncd.icmr.org.in or https://www.icmr.gov.in . Fill the application form completely. Bring one set of photocopies of all certificates along with original certificates for verification. Report at ICMR-NIHR, Jodhpur on 14-07-2026 between 09:00 AM to 10:00 AM. Eligible candidates will attend Walk-in-Interview / Written Test after verification.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions:
content_sections.text: If more than 30 eligible candidates, a written test may be conducted. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview/written test. The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Candidates who have served in ICMR projects/institutes for more than three years are not eligible. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Engagement is temporary and can be terminated with one month’s notice. Selected candidates will have no claim for regular appointment. Age, qualification, and experience will be reckoned as on the date of walk-in. All guidelines issued by ICMR will be followed.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for ICMR-NIHR Jodhpur Project Technical Support 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in-Interview / Written Test is on 14 July 2026 (Reporting 09:00 AM to 10:00 AM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support-I at ICMR NIHR Jodhpur?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy (UR category).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Technical Support-I at ICMR NIHR Jodhpur?
faq.answer: Rs. 18,000/- + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support post?
faq.answer: 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI) + 2 years experience OR Graduate degree + 1 year experience OR PG degree in Social Sciences / Life Sciences.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for ICMR NIHR Jodhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: Not exceeding 28 years (relaxation as per rules).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for ICMR NIHR Jodhpur Project Technical Support position?
faq.answer: Appear directly for Walk-in-Interview on 14-07-2026 with filled application form and original documents.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior experience mandatory for the Project Technical Support post?
faq.answer: Yes, relevant experience is part of the essential qualification.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the ICMR NIHR Jodhpur Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: At ICMR-NIHR, Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Project Technical Support position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be a written test for ICMR NIHR Project Technical Support recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, if the number of eligible candidates exceeds 30.
